title: Remove Date/Weather/Temperature from Project Information and Punch In/Out for Lead & Assistant Technicians

requirements.text: Remove the Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields from the Project Information section of the ReportForm component. These fields should no longer be rendered, editable, or included in form state.

quotes: Remove Date, Weather conditon and temparature from Project Informaion.

acceptanceCriteria: The Date field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
The Weather Condition field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
The Temperature field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
Removing these fields does not break form submission, localStorage persistence, or PDF generation.
If these fields were previously persisted in localStorage, their keys are either ignored or cleaned up gracefully on load.

requirements.text: Remove the Punch In and Punch Out fields for the Lead Technician and Assistant Technician from the Punch section of the ReportForm component. These fields should no longer be rendered, editable, saved to state, or included in localStorage persistence.

quotes: Remove Punch in, Punch out for Lead Technician and ASSIS Technician

acceptanceCriteria: Punch In and Punch Out fields for Lead Technician are no longer visible in the form.
Punch In and Punch Out fields for Assistant Technician are no longer visible in the form.
Removing these fields does not break the overall form, other punch entries (if any), localStorage persistence, or PDF generation.
The PDF generator (pdfGenerator.ts) no longer includes Lead Technician or Assistant Technician punch times in the generated report.
Any previously stored punch data for Lead/Assistant Technician in localStorage is ignored or cleaned up gracefully on load.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all other form fields and sections that are not explicitly listed for removal.
Maintain existing localStorage persistence logic for all remaining fields.
nonGoals: Adding any new fields or sections to the form.
Changing the visual theme or layout of the app beyond removing the specified fields.
Removing Punch In/Out for any personnel other than Lead Technician and Assistant Technician.
